The greater crown bulk distal to the faciolingual dissecting plane of the tooth is typically seen in mandibular lateral incisors due to their distinctive anatomy compared to other anterior teeth like centrals and canines.
\boxed{C} Based on the description given about the unique anatomical feature being present "distal to the faciolingual dissecting plane," we can infer that this characteristic aligns best with the morphology of the mandibular lateral incisor.
